extraction.one_line_summary: BENEDETTI Cesare won after being dropped on final climb, bridging back in last 700m when lead trio of BRAMBILLA, CAPECCHI, DUNBAR hesitated and waiting to outsprint them.
tactical_patterns: LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel and LANDA Mikel attacked GC group on steep section, gaining 30s while ZAKARIN caught out behind.
Lead trio BRAMBILLA/CAPECCHI/DUNBAR looked back at each other repeatedly in final 700m allowing BENEDETTI bridge from behind after being dropped.
DUNBAR Eddie attacked alone on first cobbled climb passage, fracturing 25-rider breakaway before being caught by chasers.
MOLLEMA Bauke caught out in split at finish losing 30s to main GC group despite UAE controlling all day.

rider_signals.BENEDETTI Cesare: positive: inferior climber who tactically saved energy in break, repeatedly bridged after being dropped, then held fresher legs for sprint
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: positive: first professional win attempt, soloed clear on cobbled climb but lacked experience to convert against veterans BRAMBILLA/CAPECCHI
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: first GC attack after earlier disaster, gained time immediately suggesting earlier losses were tactical not physical
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: followed LÓPEZ attack gaining 30s, UAE already forcing Bahrain to chase despite POLANC taking pink
rider_signals.MOLLEMA Bauke: negative: caught behind split in GC group losing 30s despite UAE controlling tempo all day
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: negative: only major GC rider caught out in finale split losing 30s, positioning error not legs
rider_signals.POLANC Jan: neutral: moved into pink jersey but gapped temporarily on steep section before regrouping, 4:07 advantage over ROGLIČ vulnerable
